name: token-efficient-repo-work
description: Inject compact repository context and route large outputs through token-capped helpers.

interface.shortDescription: Compact repository context with token-safe helpers
interface.longDescription: Adds a SessionStart context hook, a PreToolUse hook that denies token-wasteful Bash commands with a capped replacement, a repository inspection skill, and redacting helpers for code, logs, tests, diffs, JSON, and tabular data.
defaultPrompt: Use $token-efficient-repo-work to inspect this repository with minimal context.
